titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Calhoun College, Yale University, Student Records for the Classes of 1964-2016 Maintained by the Dean
Calhoun College, Yale University, Student Records for the Classes of 1964-2016 Maintained by the Dean
titlestmt.author: compiled by Staff of Manuscripts and Archives

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday January 23, 2020 at 09:36
Finding aid revision description not supplied.

did.unittitle: Calhoun College, Yale University, student records for the Classes of 1964-2016 maintained by the dean
did.abstract: The records consist of student records maintained by the dean of Calhoun College, Yale University.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 13-E-1 (YRG 13-E-1), Records of the dean of Calhoun College.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the materials is restricted. See Collection Contents for details.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Calhoun College, Yale University, Student Records for the Classes of 1964-2016 Maintained by the Dean (RU 255). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Yale University records are arranged and described at the accession level by the creating office. The University Archives creates collection level descriptive records, but typically does no further arrangement and description at the accession level.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of student records maintained by the dean of Calhoun College, Yale University.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by accession.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Some records in this finding aid have been redacted, as they include student names, donor names, and other restricted data. These records will not appear in the published finding aid.

did.unittitle: Student records for the Class of 1968
Student records for the Classes of 1974-1978 (impounded)
Student records for the Classes of 2003 to 2016

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Student records are restricted until 2092 as established by Yale Corporation regulations http://web.library.yale.edu/mssa/collections/research-use-of-yale-university-archives.
